hero.title: Flash your NerdQaxe++ directly from the web
hero.description: Connect your device, select the version, and start flashing immediately. No setup required.
hero.loggingDescription: Connect your device, log the serial data and download it later on.

fastFlashing.title: Fast Flashing
fastFlashing.description: Flash your NerdQaxe++ in seconds, not minutes.

webBased.title: Web-Based
webBased.description: No need for special software. Use your web browser.

instructions.title: How to Use

steps.1: Connect your NerdQaxe++ to your computer.
steps.2: Click "Connect Device" and select your device from the popup.
steps.4: Click "Start Flashing" to begin the process.
steps.5: Wait for the flashing process to complete.

instructions.moreInfo: For more detailed instructions, please refer to our

status.selectBoth: Please select both device model and board version
status.connectFirst: Please connect to a device first
status.completed: Flashing completed. Restarting device, please wait...
status.success: Flashing completed successfully! Device has been restarted.
status.downloadFirmware: Downloading firmware and verifying its integrity...

browserCompatibility.title: Browser Compatibility Error
browserCompatibility.description: This application requires a Chromium-based browser (such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, or Brave) to function properly. Please switch to a compatible browser and try again.
